mano_cua.result_summary: Swagger UI Schema 部分正确展示了所有 DTO 的属性。CreateCatDto 显示了 name、age、_breed、tags、createdAt、urls、options、rawDefinition、enumWithDescription、enum、enumArr、enumWithRef、tag、xEnumTest 等完整属性列表。Cat Schema 同样完整展示了 name、age、breed、_tags、createdAt、urls、_options、rawDefinition、enum、enumArr、enumWithRef、oneOfExample、kittenIds 等所有字段及其类型信息。Schema 定义中的字段类型、描述信息均正确呈现，属性未丢失。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Examined CreateCatDto and Cat schemas in the Swagger UI JSON spec. All properties are correctly displayed with their types, descriptions, and required status. No inheritance-related issues found - all schema properties including base and extended attributes are rendered completely.
